By way of fixed charge:. All interests and estates in any freehold, leasehold or commonhold property now or subsequently owned by it (other than any freehold, leasehold or commonhold property effectively charged by way of legal mortgage under clause 3.2) and, in each case, all buildings and fixtures (as defined in clauses 1.1 of the debenture) on each such property;. The proceeds of sale of its secured property (as defined in clauses 1.1 of the debenture) and all licences to enter on or use any secured property;. The benefit of all other agreements, instruments and rights relating to its secured property;. All its intellectual property (as defined in clauses 1.1 of the debenture).
